title: °maia/factory/context.factory.json
description: Runtime data for an actor (flexible JSON structure). The context itself is a comap CoValue (for CRDT sync/versioning), but all inner properties are plain JS objects/arrays/strings - NOT CoJSON types.

additionalProperties.description: Any context fields (query objects, collections, UI state, form values, etc.). Query objects have factory + options properties. All inner properties are plain JS types (objects/arrays/strings/primitives) - NOT CoJSON types.

anyOf.description: Query object for reactive subscription (has factory property). Can include nested options object with map, filter, etc.
Array of data items (after SubscriptionEngine processes the query object)
Any other nested object (UI state, form values, etc.)
